title: ferray-core: no copyto() equivalent for broadcasting assignment
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.copyto(dst, src, casting='same_kind', where=mask) copies values from src to dst with broadcasting. It handles dtype casting, a boolean mask, and broadcasting in a single operation. ferray-core has boolean_index_assign for masked scalar assignment but no general copyto that broadcasts src into dst shape. This is a fundamental building block — used internally by NumPy for setitem, ufunc output, and masked operations.
